summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Timeless Parts and Accessories inventory management system. Backend APIs are highly functional (95.8% success rate). Frontend loads properly with working navigation, but has critical JavaScript runtime errors affecting Select components and dialog interactions.

minor_bugs.issue: Tax settings update endpoint expects different parameter format than implemented
minor_bugs.impact: Tax rate updates may fail in settings page

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript runtime errors: Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string
Page fails to load due to Select component errors, inventory management non-functional
Part selection dialog shows 'No parts found' despite parts existing in database

integration_issues.issue: Unable to access inventory management due to Select component runtime errors
Cannot add parts to invoices - part selection not working properly

passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard loads with all stats cards and data
✅ Navigation sidebar functional across all pages
✅ Customer management page loads and form works
✅ Settings page loads with all company information
✅ Invoice creation page loads and customer form works
✅ Backend APIs: Parts, Customers, Invoices, Dashboard, Reports, Settings (95.8% success)
✅ Responsive layout and branding displays correctly
✅ Company logo and styling implemented properly
success_percentage: Backend: 95.8%, Frontend: 60% (major components broken due to Select errors)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component errors causing inventory management failure. All Select/SelectItem components need proper value props. The Select components are causing runtime errors that prevent inventory page from loading and part selection in invoice creation from working. This breaks core functionality of the inventory management system.
